enrichment.summary: Kyle films a short vlog from Boulder on a Sunday, recounting how he accidentally went to work on Saturday, discovered a new outdoor summer workspace near his home, got high with his roommate, and plans to spend the day making videos. The vlog ends with a brief dramatic spoken-word passage about warlords and battle.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited about his new summertime outdoor office spot with mountain views
